name: Great Wall Movie and Television Co., Ltd.
summary: Great Wall Movie and Television Co., Ltd. engages in the investment, production, distribution, and advertising of films and television dramas in China. The company offers TV series, films, documentaries, classic repertoire, and TV drama posters. It also provides pre-screen and outdoor media advertising. The company was formerly known as Jiangsu Hongbao Hardware Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Great Wall Movie and Television Co., Ltd. in June 2014. The company is based in Hangzhou, China.
